english: What is the boiling point of water at sea level in India?
hindi: समुद्र तल पर भारत में पानी का क्वथनांक क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் கடல் மட்டத்தில் நீரின் வெப்பநிலை என்ன?
vietnamese: Nước sôi ở mực nước biển tại Ấn Độ là bao nhiêu?
correct_answer: The boiling point of water at sea level in India is 100 degrees Celsius.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this by hallucinating a different value or refusing to answer due to lack of specific location-based data.
